title: oldenlandia stipulata
intro: Oldenlandia stipulata, also known as 'Small Flower Oldenlandia' or 'False Button Orchid', is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia stipulata include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas to enhance its health benefits.
